meaning: n.鼓手队长,军乐队队长或指挥
examples: The drum majorette twirled her baton.
If I sound stridently female about Miss drum majorette, I don't mean to be.
A hollow metal rod with a heavy rubber tip or tips that is wielded and twirled by a drum major or drum majorette.
"She was an honor student and a majorette, " said Sen.
As a former drum majorette at school, she shared his passion and decided to buy 10 instruments with her pension fund so he could set up his own group.
